comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Harness restart showed the first fix was incomplete: API/harness tool contexts can have both ctx.cwd and sessionManager.getCwd absent. Added boundary normalization so spawned agents use session cwd when present, ctx.cwd when present, and process.cwd() for cwd-less harness contexts; added regression coverage for the cwd-less harness case.

comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Second live harness retest showed the TypeError was thrown by path-based session getters before cwd normalization completed. Added safe string getter boundaries around sessionManager.getCwd() and getSessionFile(); unsafe getters now produce process.cwd() and undefined parentSessionFile respectively. Regression test reproduces the exact TypeError from those getters.
